title: lepidium ostleri
intro: Lepidium ostleri is a plant species also known as Ostler's pepper grass or Ostler's pepperwort, belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lepidium ostleri include its ability to aid digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Lepidium ostleri often involve drying the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as a tea or used in infusions to leverage its medicinal properties.
